name: Maintenance Parts Approval Gate
script:
# Enforce PKR 10,000 parts-approval gate (authoritative, server-side).
blocked_states = ("In Progress", "Completed", "Signed Off", "Billed")
if (doc.workflow_state in blocked_states
        and (doc.total_parts_cost or 0) > 10000
        and not doc.parts_approved):
    frappe.throw(
        "Parts cost exceeds PKR 10,000 \u2014 manager approval required "
        "before work can proceed."
    )
